items.name: voice-mic-button
items.title: Voice Mic Button
items.description: Mic button with idle / recording / finalizing states. Wire to useVoiceRecorder's output.

items.name: voice-transcript-field
items.title: Voice Transcript Field
items.description: Textarea for the live transcript. Read-only while recording.

items.name: voice-send-button
items.title: Voice Send Button
items.description: Send button that handles stop-and-send while recording, spinner while finalizing, and disabled-when-empty.
